# Self-Service Resources

At Acme Shop, our Self-Service Resources enhance customer support by providing immediate access to solutions through the Help Centre, FAQs, and a Virtual Assistant. The Help Centre contains a vast library of articles addressing topics like order tracking and returns, while the FAQs section offers quick answers to common inquiries about shipping, returns, and fees. For personalized help, the Virtual Assistant is available 24/7 and can connect users to live agents when necessary, ensuring efficient customer service and support.

[Source: customer_support.md#self-service-resources]
